description: Welcome to the harsh lands of Gloomhaven, recruit. You think you have what it takes to become a mercenary out here on the edge of the world?

v2.0.6-gloomhaven-manual.description:
# A.K.A The "Now on GitHub" Release!

- put APWorld code on GitHub
- updated to Stable Manual 20260319
- added manifest
- updated docs
v2.0.6-gloomhaven-manual.title: Gloomhaven Manual APWorld v2.0.6

v2.1.0-gloomhaven-manual.description:
## Minor logic tweaks
 - Broke up the JotL DLC content into more spheres; JotL story scenarios 1-6 require 2 JotL classes as before, story scenarios 7-12 and side scenarios 20 and 21 require 3 JotL classes, and story scenarios 13-17 and side scenarios 18 and 19 require all four JotL classes.
 - Added events for each enemy and boss type, to give a couple of the Personal Quests simpler and more accurate logic.
 
 ### Note
 This update means the PopTracker logic will be slightly out of date until I can figure out a way to make the converter tool actually handle events.
v2.1.0-gloomhaven-manual.title: Gloomhaven Manual APWorld v2.1.0

v2.1.1-gloomhaven-manual.description:
## Starting character bugfixes
 - In the refactor and move to latest stable Manual base, I accidentally broke the starting character count option; this is now fixed
 - additionally, there was an existing bug that could result in some starting classes not actually being included; this is also fixed
v2.1.1-gloomhaven-manual.title: Gloomhaven Manual APWorld v2.1.1
